song.title: Saving One
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[v1] . C What mercy was revealed . G What selflessness and peace . F My fate was surely sealed . G C Until He rescued me . C His pardon for my sin . G His bounty for my need . F From slavery and shame . G C I am redeemed
[c] . C F And heaven can’t contain . Am G The glory of the Son . F Am G Jesus is the Christ the saving one . F His love has made a way . Am G The grave is overcome . F G C Jesus is the Christ the saving one
[v2] . C No fear can hold me down . G Nor darkness steal my joy . F For blood has been poured out . G C The enemy destroyed . C Death could not hold Him down . G The cross was not enough . F To steal away His throne . G C For He is God
[b] . F G And anyone who calls upon His name . F Am G They will be saved, they will be saved . F G And anyone who calls upon His name . F GC They will be saved, they will be saved
